parameters.name: hook_id
parameters.description: The ID of the webhook that triggered the ping.

parameters.name: hook
parameters.description: The webhook that is being pinged.

request.description: ping event payload (JSON request body of the webhook delivery).

responses.description: Receiver must respond with HTTP 200 within 10 seconds. A non-200 response or a response slower than 10 seconds is recorded as a failed delivery; GitHub does not automatically redeliver.

missing: No full example payload body is provided in the source for this event; object-typed properties (repository, sender, hook, commits) are not expanded.
summary: ping webhook event. Sent when a new webhook is created, to confirm the configuration. Delivered as an HTTP POST to the configured webhook URL with X-GitHub-Event: ping.
